subject: refactor: extract functions, deduplicate code, improve quality across engine and views
body:
Split large functions into focused helpers:
- patterns.ts: projectPattern() switch cases → 7 standalone functions + shared calculateIntervals()
- forecast.ts: buildForecast() → projectRecurringItems, computeHistoricalResiduals, fitVariableModel, assembleDailyForecast

Extract reusable utilities:
- useSafeStorage.ts: centralised localStorage wrapper with debugLog error reporting
- useInstallReminder.ts: install reminder logic extracted from WorkspaceListView
- transactionMath.ts: shared totalIncome/totalExpenses/estimateMonthlySpend helpers

Code quality fixes:
- Remove dead bootstrapPredictionBands() function and tests (unused, quantileSorted import removed)
- Rename summariseAccuracy → summarizeAccuracy for consistent American English
- Fix pattern matching null checks: skip patterns with empty description, handle expectedAmount=0
- Deduplicate interval calculation in NewImportWizard via calculateIntervals() from patterns.ts
- Add rationale comments to magic numbers (VARIABLE_CV_THRESHOLD, DEFAULT_ALPHA/BETA, etc.)

Tags: refactor, engine, cleanup, quality, patterns, forecast, accuracy
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: minor
